# Mimic.Studio - B2B & B2C Websites & Custom Software

## About
Mimic.Studio is a B2B and B2C studio building custom websites and software tailored to each business. Whether you sell to businesses or directly to consumers, we design high-converting websites and build the custom software and tools you need — booking systems, dashboards, integrations — around how you actually work. We handle everything end to end, from design and development to launch and ongoing support, so your life is easier.

## Services
- B2B Website Design & Lead Generation
- B2C Website Design & Conversion Optimization
- Custom Web Design & Development
- SEO Optimization & Google Rankings
- Responsive Mobile-First Design
- Conversion Rate Optimization
- Custom Software, Web Apps & Tailored Tools
- Analytics Integration & Tracking
- Vercel Deployment & Hosting
- Website Redesign & Improvement
- Ongoing Maintenance & Support
- Technical SEO Implementation

## Technologies
Vite, React, Tailwind CSS, Motion (Framer Motion), EmailJS, Vercel Analytics, Vercel Speed Insights, React Helmet Async

## Process
1. Discovery Call - Understanding your vision and goals
2. Design Phase - Creating stunning, brand-aligned designs
3. Development - Building with modern, reliable code
4. Testing - Ensuring flawless cross-device experience
5. Launch - Deploying with monitoring and analytics
6. Support - Ongoing optimization and improvements

## Key Features
- Mobile-first responsive design across all devices
- SEO optimization with schema markup and technical SEO
- Custom software and tools tailored to your workflow
- Conversion-focused design and user experience
- Analytics and tracking integration
- Secure deployment with modern security headers
- Everything handled end to end, with ongoing support

## Why Your Business Needs a Website
1. Proven Increase - A professional website consistently drives more customer engagement and sales by opening more avenues for potential customers to find you, learn more, and reach out. It is a high-return investment that pays for itself many times over.
2. Backend - A website is more than an online brochure. Built-in tools like automated invoicing and payments, real-time reporting on your performance, and online booking and enquiry handling automate manual tasks and keep everything in one place, freeing up time for growth.
3. Credibility - By letting customers learn about your business, see your work, and read real testimonials, your website shows you are a legitimate and established business, making it easy for them to feel confident choosing you.

## About
Learn more about the studio, our approach, and the team: https://mimicstudio.co/about

## Keywords

## Pricing
Every project is custom-quoted based on scope, features, and timeline. Free consultation calls available before any commitment.

## Timeline
Every project is scoped to your goals with a clear timeline and quote before work starts. We then handle design, build, and launch end to end, plus ongoing support. Timelines depend on scope, features, and content readiness.

## FAQs
Q: What do you need from me to get started?
A: Just your goals and any brand assets you already have. We start with a free discovery call to understand your vision, then handle design, development, and launch end to end.

Q: Do you build custom software, or just websites?
A: Both. We build custom websites and tailored software or tools — booking systems, dashboards, internal tools — designed around how your business actually works.

Q: Will my website be mobile-friendly?
A: Yes, every website is fully responsive and optimized for all devices with mobile-first design.

Q: Do you provide SEO services?
A: Yes, SEO optimization is integrated into every project including technical SEO, on-page optimization, and schema markup.

Q: Can I update the website myself?
A: Yes, we can integrate CMS solutions and provide training. Technical updates available through support packages.

Q: Do you offer ongoing support?
A: Yes, we provide maintenance, security updates, performance monitoring, and content updates through monthly support packages.
